backend-spring/backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
backend-spring/backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce compatibility with the target runtime.

backend-spring/backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Comment out the MongoDB starter dependency, likely to remove it or switch to a different data store.
